select.isEqual:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DOCID, DOCTITLE, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) STARTDATE, WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, HASATTACHYN, HASOPINIONYN, APRTYPE, FUNCTIONTYPE, APRMEMBERSN, URGENTAPPROVAL, 'APR' as MODE FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND STARTDATE < #lastDate# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($id$) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))
UNION ALL
SELECT DOCID, DOCTITLE, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) STARTDATE, WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, HASATTACHYN, HASOPINIONYN, APRTYPE, FUNCTIONTYPE, APRMEMBERSN, URGENTAPPROVAL, 'END' as MODE FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND STARTDATE < #lastDate# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($id$) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))
) as LIST ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT DOCID, DOCTITLE, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) STARTDATE, WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, HASATTACHYN, HASOPINIONYN, FUNCTIONTYPE, URGENTAPPROVAL FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND STARTDATE < #lastDate# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND DocState <> '017'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))
ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT DISTINCT DOCID, DOCTITLE, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) STARTDATE, WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, HASATTACHYN, HASOPINIONYN, APRTYPE, FUNCTIONTYPE, URGENTAPPROVAL FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND STARTDATE < #lastDate# AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND APRTYPE <> '015'
AND AprState != '001'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))
ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT DISTINCT A.DOCID, A.DOCTITLE, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.ENDDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) STARTDATE, A.WRITERNAME$lang$ WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ WRITERDEPTNAME, A.HASATTACHYN, A.HASOPINIONYN, B.APRTYPE, E.CODE2 as FUNCTIONTYPE, C.URGENTAPPROVAL FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO C ON A.DOCID = C.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID
INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST E ON A.DOCSTATE = E.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST F ON A.FUNCTIONTYPE = F.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = F.COMPANYID
INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST E ON A.DOCSTATE = E.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND C.DELFLAG IS NULL AND A.ENDDATE < #lastDate# AND B.APRMEMBERID = #userId#
AND E.CODE1 ='SA02' AND F.CODE1 ='A04'
AND E.CODE1 ='A02'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))
ORDER BY ENDDATE DESC LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT * FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($id$) AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($id$) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))
) as LIST

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND DocState <> '017'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DOCID, APRTYPE) FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND APRTYPE <> '015'
AND AprState != '001'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO C ON A.DOCID = C.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID
INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST E ON A.DOCSTATE = E.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST F ON A.FUNCTIONTYPE = F.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = F.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO G ON A.DOCID = G.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = G.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = G.COMPANYID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND C.DELFLAG IS NULL AND A.ENDDATE < #nowDate# AND B.APRMEMBERID = #userId#
AND E.CODE1 ='SA02' AND F.CODE1 ='A04'
(A.DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR A.WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))

sqlMap.select:
SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT * FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($id$) AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($id$) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1) as LIST ) as aprDoCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND DocState <> '017') as aprDraftCount, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DOCID, APRTYPE) FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND APRTYPE <> '015'
AND AprState != '001'
) as aprIngCount, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.DOCID, B.APRTYPE) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO C ON A.DOCID = C.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID
INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST E ON A.DOCSTATE = E.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST F ON A.FUNCTIONTYPE = F.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = F.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO G ON A.DOCID = G.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = G.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = G.COMPANYID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND C.DELFLAG IS NULL AND A.ENDDATE < #nowDate# AND B.APRMEMBERID = #userId#
AND E.CODE1 ='SA02' AND F.CODE1 ='A04' ) as aprEndCount

select.isNotEqual: SELECT A.APRSTATE, A.APRTYPE, CASE WHEN (A.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ = '' OR A.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN A.APRMEMBERNAME ELSE A.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ END APRMEMBERNAME, CASE WHEN (A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE ELSE A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ END APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, CASE WHEN (A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME ELSE A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ END APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.RECEIVEDDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) RECEIVEDDATE, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.PROCESSDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) PROCESSDATE, CASE WHEN (B.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ = '' OR B.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN B.PROXYUSERNAME ELSE B.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ END PROXYUSERNAME, CASE WHEN (B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE ELSE B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ END PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, CASE WHEN (B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME ELSE B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ END PROXYUSERDEPTNAME, (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = A.APRMEMBERID) APRMEMBERPHOTO FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO A INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRLINE B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.APRMEMBERSN = B.APRMEMBERSN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE A.DOCID = #docID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY A.APRMEMBERSN DESC
select.isEqual: SELECT A.APRSTATE, A.APRTYPE, CASE WHEN (A.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ = '' OR A.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN A.APRMEMBERNAME ELSE A.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ END APRMEMBERNAME, CASE WHEN (A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE ELSE A.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ END APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, CASE WHEN (A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME ELSE A.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ END APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.RECEIVEDDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) RECEIVEDDATE, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.PROCESSDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) PROCESSDATE, CASE WHEN (B.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ = '' OR B.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN B.PROXYUSERNAME ELSE B.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ END PROXYUSERNAME, CASE WHEN (B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE ELSE B.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ END PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, CASE WHEN (B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME ELSE B.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ END PROXYUSERDEPTNAME, (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = A.APRMEMBERID) APRMEMBERPHOTO FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO A INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRLINE B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.APRMEMBERSN = B.APRMEMBERSN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID WHERE A.DOCID = #docID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY A.APRMEMBERSN DESC

isEqual.isEqual: SELECT HREF FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# LIMIT 1
isEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT HREF FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# LIMIT 1

select.isEqual: SELECT HREF FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# LIMIT 1
SELECT HREF FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# LIMIT 1
SELECT HREF FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_ENDAPROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID#

select.isEqual: SELECT CONTENT, OPINIONGB, USERID, CASE WHEN (USERNAME$lang$ = '' OR USERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN USERNAME ELSE USERNAME$lang$ END USERNAME, CASE WHEN (USERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR USERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN USERJOBTITLE ELSE USERJOBTITLE$lang$ END USERJOBTITLE, CASE WHEN (USERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR USERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN USERDEPTNAME ELSE USERDEPTNAME$lang$ END USERDEPTNAME FROM TBL_ENDAPROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID =#tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# ORDER BY OPINIONSN DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT CONTENT, OPINIONGB, USERID, CASE WHEN (USERNAME$lang$ = '' OR USERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN USERNAME ELSE USERNAME$lang$ END USERNAME, CASE WHEN (USERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR USERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN USERJOBTITLE ELSE USERJOBTITLE$lang$ END USERJOBTITLE, CASE WHEN (USERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR USERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN USERDEPTNAME ELSE USERDEPTNAME$lang$ END USERDEPTNAME FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID =#tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# ORDER BY OPINIONSN DESC

(SELECT DISPLAYNAME attachName, ATTACHFILEHREF attachHref, ATTACHFILESIZE attachFileSize FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# ORDER BY ATTACHFILESN)
UNION ALL
(SELECT ATTACHDOCNAME attachName, ATTACHDOCURL attachHref, 0 attachFileSize FROM TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# ORDER BY ATTACHSN)
select.isEqual:
(SELECT DISPLAYNAME attachName, ATTACHFILEHREF attachHref, ATTACHFILESIZE attachFileSize FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# ORDER BY ATTACHFILESN)
UNION ALL
(SELECT ATTACHDOCNAME attachName, ATTACHDOCURL attachHref, 0 attachFileSize FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# ORDER BY ATTACHSN)

sqlMap.select: SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND CN = #userId#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND cn = #userID# AND password = #password#

isEqual.isEqual:
SELECT DOCID, ORGDOCID, FORMID, HREF, HASATTACHYN, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, DOCSTATE, DOCTITLE, CASE WHEN (WRITERNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERNAME ELSE WRITERNAME$lang$ END WRITERNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERDEPTNAME ELSE WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ END WRITERDEPTNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERJOBTITLE ELSE WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ END WRITERJOBTITLE FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID#
APRMEMBERSN = #aprMemberSN#
LIMIT 1
isEqual.isNotEqual:
SELECT DOCID, ORGDOCID, FORMID, HREF, HASATTACHYN, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, DOCSTATE, DOCTITLE, CASE WHEN (WRITERNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERNAME ELSE WRITERNAME$lang$ END WRITERNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERDEPTNAME ELSE WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ END WRITERDEPTNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERJOBTITLE ELSE WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ END WRITERJOBTITLE FROM VENDCHAMJODOCINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID#
APRMEMBERSN = #aprMemberSN#
LIMIT 1

select.isEqual: SELECT DOCID, ORGDOCID, FORMID, HREF, HASATTACHYN, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, DOCSTATE, DOCTITLE, CASE WHEN (WRITERNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERNAME ELSE WRITERNAME$lang$ END WRITERNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERDEPTNAME ELSE WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ END WRITERDEPTNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERJOBTITLE ELSE WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ END WRITERJOBTITLE FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# LIMIT 1

SELECT DOCID, ORGDOCID, FORMID, HREF, HASATTACHYN, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, DOCSTATE, DOCTITLE, CASE WHEN (WRITERNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERNAME ELSE WRITERNAME$lang$ END WRITERNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERDEPTNAME ELSE WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ END WRITERDEPTNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERJOBTITLE ELSE WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ END WRITERJOBTITLE FROM VAPRWILLDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# LIMIT 1

SELECT A.DOCID, A.ORGDOCID, A.FORMID, A.HREF, A.HASATTACHYN, B.APRMEMBERID, B.APRMEMBERNAME, B.APRMEMBERNAME2, B.APRMEMBERDEPTID, A.DOCSTATE, A.DOCTITLE, CASE WHEN (A.WRITERNAME$lang$ = '' OR A.WRITERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERNAME ELSE A.WRITERNAME$lang$ END WRITERNAME, CASE WHEN (A.WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR A.WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERDEPTNAME ELSE A.WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ END WRITERDEPTNAME, CASE WHEN (A.WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR A.WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERJOBTITLE ELSE A.WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ END WRITERJOBTITLE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO C ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID
INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST E ON A.DOCSTATE = E.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST F ON A.FUNCTIONTYPE = F.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = F.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO G ON A.DOCID = G.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = G.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = G.COMPANYID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.DOCID = #docID#
AND E.CODE1 ='SA02' AND F.CODE1 ='A04'
LIMIT 1

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_APROPINIONINFO ( DocID, UserID, OpinionGB, Content, UserName, UserName2, UserJobTitle, UserJobTitle2, UserDeptID, UserDeptName, UserDeptName2, OpinionSN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) SELECT #docID#, CN, #opinionGB#, #content#, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, TITLE, TITLE2, DEPARTMENT, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, (SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(OPINIONSN) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(OPINIONSN) + 1 END OPINIONSN FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID#), #tenantID#, #companyID# FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #userID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRDOCINFO SET HASOPINIONYN = #hasOpinionYN# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 = #absenteeInfo# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND CN = #userId#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 = NULL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #userId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# AND USERID = #userID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DOCID, ORGDOCID, FORMID, HREF, HASATTACHYN, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, DOCSTATE, DOCTITLE, APRMEMBERSN, CASE WHEN (WRITERNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERNAME ELSE WRITERNAME$lang$ END WRITERNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERDEPTNAME ELSE WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$ END WRITERDEPTNAME, CASE WHEN (WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN WRITERJOBTITLE ELSE WRITERJOBTITLE$lang$ END WRITERJOBTITLE FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID#
LIMIT 1
